description: A mischievous yellow-throated marten pet with a Machinarium-inspired brass-mechanical body, black face, golden throat, and huge fluffy tail.

idle.notes: Quiet stand-or-sit loop with blink, ear twitch, nose sniff, and slow tail sway.

walk.notes: Directional quadruped walk used for drag-facing movement.

happy.notes: Tiny in-place bounce with raised-tail wag and brighter playful expression.

alert.notes: Curious head tilt, forward ears, and small sniff.

sleep.notes: Curled sleeping ball with the tail wrapped over the body.

damaged.notes: Repurposed here as a fluff reaction where chest and tail poof outward, then settle.

sneak.notes: The fixed 9-row Codex atlas does not provide a separate installed sneak row, so the low-body run row is the closest locomotion approximation.

peek.notes: The fixed 9-row Codex atlas does not provide a separate installed peek row, so the curious head-forward row is the closest expressive approximation.

roll.notes: The fixed 9-row Codex atlas was fully allocated to the main installable set, so roll is not a separate installed row in this package.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk-left and walk-right are not swapped
